title: Jaguars run riot against Knysna United
description: PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - The Jaguars Rugby...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - The Jaguars Rugby Club's A team delivered a commanding performance in their SWD First League A clash last Saturday, thrashing Knysna United 45-5 to maintain their perfect home record.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - The Jaguars Rugby Club's A team delivered a commanding performance in their SWD First League A clash last Saturday, thrashing Knysna United 45-5 to maintain their perfect home record."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"This victory was sweet revenge for their first-round loss against Knysna earlier this season."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The home side turned in a clinical display flair, with their tight five laying the platform for a loose trio that ran rampant across the field.","html":"The home side turned in a clinical display flair, with their tight five laying the platform for a loose trio that ran rampant across the field."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Jaguars' blend of structure and expansive running rugby, often referred to by fans as their "champagne style", was on full display, much to the delight of the local supporters.","html":"Jaguars' blend of structure and expansive running rugby, often referred to by fans as their "champagne style", was on full display, much to the delight of the local supporters."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Knysna, who edged the Jaguars in their previous meeting, struggled to find momentum throughout the match and were left chasing shadows as the hosts ran in multiple tries with pace.","html":"Knysna, who edged the Jaguars in their previous meeting, struggled to find momentum throughout the match and were left chasing shadows as the hosts ran in multiple tries with pace."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"With their away form under scrutiny this season, Saturday's performance was a timely confidence boost ahead of their crucial upcoming fixture against Maoris.","html":"With their away form under scrutiny this season, Saturday's performance was a timely confidence boost ahead of their crucial upcoming fixture against Maoris."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Jaguars will be looking to translate their home success into their first away win of the campaign."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Supporters once again filled Neverland in full voice, providing an electric atmosphere that lifted the team.","html":"Supporters once again filled Neverland in full voice, providing an electric atmosphere that lifted the team."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Jaguars club officials praised the continued loyalty of the fans and hope the travelling faithful can help energise the team on the road as well.","html":"Jaguars club officials praised the continued loyalty of the fans and hope the travelling faithful can help energise the team on the road as well."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Earlier in the day, the Jaguars' B team also notched up a 21-0 win over Knysna.","html":"Earlier in the day, the Jaguars' B team also notched up a 21-0 win over Knysna."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram.","html":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok.","html":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone.","html":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone."}]
